patch.value: CLI perf, simplification, and best-practice remediation (2026-05-27)

Session epic: drastically reduce per-command latency (list/get/search/health), simplify command surface, harden SDK/extensibility, verify calendar + model-agnostic vector search, raise code quality, keep 100% coverage and fast CI. Tracks evidence-backed perf findings and sub-agent audit results.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Opened PR #77 (perf/cache-health-drift-startup): metadata body-split cache, skip-unchanged cache writes, onRead short-circuit, cached with-body path (removed dead listAllDocuments), drift verification cache (health 8.4s->1.3s), and advisory telemetry health warnings (ok:false fix). Closes pm-4r5t + pm-1lgy. All local gates green: 1852 tests, 100% coverage, typecheck, static/docs-skills, secrets, changelog. Awaiting CI + AI bot review.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: PR #77 merged to main (merge commit 3a85a060) after full green CI (build, compat/smokes/static/typecheck/coverage gates, runtime matrix macos+ubuntu Node 20/22/24) and AI bot review. Addressed CodeRabbit+Codex P2 findings in follow-up 42cfead6: drift-cache key now includes ctime_ms; --strict-exit help clarified (gates on ok, advisory telemetry excluded); onRead hook warnings surfaced. Sourcery was rate-limited (non-blocking). Shipped: pm list 401->310ms, pm health 8.4s->1.3s, health ok:true. Closed pm-4r5t + pm-1lgy; follow-ups pm-edge/xzrx/7ilo/1b96/fl0c remain open under this epic.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Session 2026-05-28: opened branch feat/agent-ux-compact-output-and-mutation-guards to close two epic children as ONE coherent agent-UX + token-efficiency PR (the user's critical priority). Scope: pm-edge (create-type mistype guard; compact validate output via required_fields-only per-field ID arrays; dedupe search/list filters block to stop emitting projection.fields twice) + pm-fl0c (test --add inline-env wording; depends_on dep-kind alias->blocked_by; surface same-command nearest-flag did-you-mean in human output — verified MISSING on current build for 'pm create --titel'; plan materialize skip completed/already-materialized steps; close inline --resolution/--expected/--actual; scaffold uses install-safe typed extension shape). Deferred to follow-up PRs: pm-7ilo (model-agnostic search config), pm-xzrx (calendar), pm-1b96 (refactors), pm-ss1d (esbuild bundling). Three specialized sub-agents own disjoint file sets to avoid conflicts.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Session 2026-05-28 (cont): closed pm-edge + pm-fl0c on feat/agent-ux-compact-output-and-mutation-guards in a single PR. 8 fixes: (1) create-type guard refuses pm create Epic with no title via PmCliError(create_positional_type_without_title), (2) validate metadata details emit counts/item_ids only for active required_fields (~150 redundant lines/run gone on minimal preset), (3) list/search filters block dropped duplicated projection.{mode,fields}, (4) OSA Damerau-Levenshtein in core/shared/levenshtein.ts (adjacent transposition cost 1) — fixes both bootstrap-args auto-correct AND commander-usage flag-typo hints; affects scoreCommandPathMatch too, (5) test --add wording now says INLINE in the command string with example, (6) --dep kind=depends_on accepted as canonical blocked_by alias on update + dep-remove, (7) plan materialize idempotent — resolveMaterializeTargets returns {targets, skipped}; new PlanCommandResult.materialize_skipped, (8) pm close --resolution/--expected-result/--actual-result inline (+snake aliases) applied pre-validation so one call satisfies --validate-close strict, (B-1) scaffold emits defineExtension import + wrapper matching docs. New tests: levenshtein.spec.ts (post-loop-guard branch via abcd/abcyy@1), plan/close/update/scaffold/help-runtime positive coverage. Gates: 1866 tests, 100% coverage (stmt/branch/func/line), typecheck, quality:static, quality:docs-skills, security:scan. PR pending. Follow-ups (deferred): pm-1b96 refactors, pm-7ilo model-agnostic search, pm-xzrx calendar, pm-ss1d esbuild bundling.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: PR #78 opened — https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/pull/78 (feat/agent-ux-compact-output-and-mutation-guards -> main). +550/-65. State: OPEN MERGEABLE. Bot reviews triggered (@codex, /gemini review, @gemini-code-assist, @coderabbitai, @sourcery-ai). Waiting 20 minutes for CI + bot feedback per workflow.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: PR #78 first bot pass landed (CI fully green 13/13). Addressing actionable findings: Codex P2 #1 — scaffold defineExtension import would ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND in extension-only mode (no package.json with the dep); split to typed shape for package mode and import-free + JSDoc @param shape for extension-only mode. Codex P2 #2 — added --resolution/--expected-result/--actual-result (with snake aliases) to CLOSE_FLAG_CONTRACTS so pm contracts/JSON help/bootstrap normalization surface them. Gemini high #1+#2 — defensive optional-chain guards in validate buildMetadataCheck (counts + item_ids loops) so a future custom required_field never throws TypeError. Gemini medium (idempotency) — pm plan materialize --steps all now returns a successful no-op (exit 0) with materialize_skipped populated when every selected step is already done, instead of throwing NOT_FOUND. Gemini medium (simplify) — dropped redundant trimmed.length===0 check in normalizeDependencyKindInput. CodeRabbit's 7 "don't edit .agents/pm files" comments: skipped — pm IS the system of record AND tracks these files in git (the entire pm-cli design). Sourcery shape-dedup: nice-to-have, deferred. 1866 tests, 100% coverage, all gates green. Re-triggering reviews.
